Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Possible issues The chainprecedence from Authorize Contract Terms to Preliminary Credit Check seems conflicting because Credit Check comes before Authorization

Name: Validation - PE
